documentation.description: Message to control a camera mount, directional antenna, etc.

record_types.name: Mount_Control

fields.name: Input_A
fields.description: Pitch (centi-degrees) or lat (degE7), depending on mount mode.

fields.name: Input_B
fields.description: Roll (centi-degrees) or lon (degE7) depending on mount mode.

fields.name: Input_C
fields.description: Yaw (centi-degrees) or alt (cm) depending on mount mode.

fields.name: Save_Position
fields.description:
If "1" it will save current trimmed position on EEPROM (just valid
for NEUTRAL and LANDING).

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
